case_title: FILLMORE PROPERTIES, LLC VS. LETISHA HUMPHREY et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILLMORE PROPERTIES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT HUMPHREY, LETISHA DOES 1 THRU 5, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SUMMONS RETURNED FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILLMORE PROPERTIES, LLC
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILLMORE PROPERTIES, LLC SERVED AUG-13-2003, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HUMPHREY, LETISHA
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED AS TO DEFENDANT HUMPHREY, LETISHA
DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT - RENTAL AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILLMORE PROPERTIES, LLC

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FILLMORE PROPERTIES, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HUMPHREY, LETISHA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1545 EDDY ST. #215, S.F. CA. 94115, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DECLARATION RE DAILY RENTAL VALUE: $43.47 FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILLMORE PROPERTIES, LLC
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT HUMPHREY, LETISHA
FILING FEE FOR APPLICATION AND ORDER VACATING JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILLMORE PROPERTIES, LLC
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
ORDER ON APPLICATION VACATING JUDGMENT. IT IS HEREBY ORDERED THAT THE POSSESSORY JUDGMENT PREVIOUSLY ENTERED HEREIN BE SET ASIDE SO THAT THIS MATTER BE DISMISSED, WITHOUT PREJUDICE.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
